layout.title: Casa de la Viuda
layout.description: A place to relax and enjoy the life. Reserve the entire Casa de la Viuda vacation home.

hero.imageAlt: The rocky coastline and lighthouse by Casa de la Viuda
hero.eyebrow: 01 — Welcome to Casa de la Viuda
hero.title: Great Experiences at Casa de la Viuda
hero.subtitle: A place to relax and enjoy the life

about.paragraphOne: Since 1986, Casa de la Viuda has welcomed guests to a quiet stretch of coastline built around a single idea: a place to relax and enjoy the life. The entire home — every bedroom, the shared living spaces, and the garden — is reserved by one group of guests at a time.
about.paragraphTwo: From the poolside terrace to the garden-facing kitchen, every stay comes with the same attention to detail our guests have returned for across four decades of hospitality.

cta.title: Request Your Stay at Casa de la Viuda
cta.body: Tell us your dates and party size — our team confirms every request within 24 hours.

detail.partOfHomeBody: This space is part of Casa de la Viuda and isn't booked separately. Guests reserve the entire home.
